subcodes.first_line: O daughter of 'Alí! Hearken unto the call of the Sovereign of earth and heaven, Who from the right hand of the Most Great Prison calleth thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنت علی بشنو ندای ملیک ارض و سما را که از یمین سجن اعظم ندا میفرماید و ترا
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
